assignments.expression: debug_mode_i ? 192'b0 : {key0[0], key0[1], key0[2], key0[3], key0[4], key0[5]}
assignments.text: assign key_big0    = debug_mode_i ? 192'b0 : {key0[0], key0[1], key0[2], key0[3], key0[4], key0[5]};

assignments.expression: debug_mode_i ? 192'b0 : {key1[0], key1[1], key1[2], key1[3], key1[4], key1[5]}
assignments.text: assign key_big1    = debug_mode_i ? 192'b0 : {key1[0], key1[1], key1[2], key1[3], key1[4], key1[5]};
assign key_big2    = {key2[0], key2[1], key2[2], key2[3], key2[4], key2[5]};
assign key_big = key_sel[1] ? key_big2 : ( key_sel[0] ? key_big1 : key_big0 );
assign core_key  = key_sel[1] ? core_key2 : (key_sel[0] ? core_key1 : core_key0) ;
assign core_keylen  = key_sel[1] ? keylen_reg2 : (key_sel[0] ? keylen_reg1 : keylen_reg0) ;
assign cii_K0    = debug_mode_i ? 128'b0 : {key0[0], key0[1], key0[2], key0[3]};
assign cii_K1    = debug_mode_i ? 128'b0 : {key1[0], key1[1], key1[2], key1[3]};
assign cii_K2    = debug_mode_i ? 128'b0 : {key2[0], key2[1], key2[2], key2[3]};
assign cii_K = key_sel[1] ? cii_K2 : ( key_sel[0] ? cii_K1 : cii_K0 );

assignments.expression: debug_mode_i ? 256'b0 : {key0[0], key0[1], key0[2], key0[3], key0[4], key0[5], key0[6], key0[7]}
assignments.text: assign key    = debug_mode_i ? 256'b0 : {key0[0], key0[1], key0[2], key0[3], key0[4], key0[5], key0[6], key0[7]};

assignments.expression: {ikey_hash_bytes[0], ikey_hash_bytes[1], ikey_hash_bytes[2], ikey_hash_bytes[3], ikey_hash_bytes[4], ikey_hash_bytes[5], ikey_hash_bytes[6], ikey_hash_bytes[7]}
assignments.text: assign ikey_hash = {ikey_hash_bytes[0], ikey_hash_bytes[1], ikey_hash_bytes[2], ikey_hash_bytes[3], ikey_hash_bytes[4], ikey_hash_bytes[5], ikey_hash_bytes[6], ikey_hash_bytes[7]};

assignments.expression: debug_mode_i ? 256'b0 : {okey_hash_bytes[0], okey_hash_bytes[1], okey_hash_bytes[2], okey_hash_bytes[3], okey_hash_bytes[4], okey_hash_bytes[5], okey_hash_bytes[6], okey_hash_bytes[7]}
assignments.text: assign okey_hash = debug_mode_i ? 256'b0 : {okey_hash_bytes[0], okey_hash_bytes[1], okey_hash_bytes[2], okey_hash_bytes[3], okey_hash_bytes[4], okey_hash_bytes[5], okey_hash_bytes[6], okey_hash_bytes[7]};

    .acct_ctrl_i   ( acc_ctrl_c[priv_lvl_i][6]),
    .acc_ctrl_o    ( acc_ctrl  ),
    .we_flag       ( we_flag_0 ),

.clk                    ( clk_i                         ),
    .rst                    ( ~rst_ni                       ),
    // to/from NOC

    .splitter_bridge_data   ( buf_ariane_acct_noc2_data_i  ),

    .acct_ctrl_i   ( acc_ctrl_c[priv_lvl_i][9]),
    .jtag_unlock   ( jtag_unlock  ),

    .splitter_bridge_data   ( buf_ariane_reglk_noc2_data_i  ),
    .bridge_splitter_rdy    ( ariane_reglk_buf_noc2_ready_o ),

    .acct_ctrl_i   ( acc_ctrl_c[priv_lvl_i][8]),
    .pmpcfg_i      ( pmpcfg_i  ),
    .pmpaddr_i     ( pmpaddr_i  ),

    .bridge_splitter_rdy    ( ariane_dma_buf_noc2_ready_o ),

clk_i,
           rst_ni,
           reglk_ctrl_i,
           acct_ctrl_i,
           acc_ctrl_o,
           we_flag,

.clk_i      ( clk_i      ),
        .rst_ni     ( rst_ni     ),
        .axi_req_i  ( axi_req_i  ),
        .axi_resp_o ( axi_resp_o ),
        .address_o  ( address    ),

clk_i,

clk_i,

        .axi_req_i  ( axi_req_i  ),
        .axi_resp_o ( axi_resp_o ),
        .address_o  ( address    ),
        .en_o       ( en_acct    ),

.clk(clk_i),
                .reset_n(rst_ni && ~rst_2),

                .encdec(core_encdec),
                .init(core_init),
                .next(core_next),

clk_i,
           rst_ni,
           reglk_ctrl_i,

        .axi_req_i  ( axi_req_i  ),
        .axi_resp_o ( axi_resp_o ),
        .address_o  ( address    ),
        .en_o       ( en_acct    ),

.iv(state_big),
    .rst(rst_ni && ~rst_11),
    .start(start),
    .cii_K(cii_K),
    .input_pc(dii_data),

clk_i,
           rst_ni,
           reglk_ctrl_i,
           acct_ctrl_i,
           debug_mode_i,
           axi_req_i,

input logic rst_4;

// internal signals

.clk_i      ( clk_i      ),
        .rst_ni     ( rst_ni     ),
        .axi_req_i  ( axi_req_i  ),
        .axi_resp_o ( axi_resp_o ),
        .address_o  ( address    ),
        .en_o       ( en_acct    ),

        .rst_ni(rst_ni && ~rst_4),
        .init_i(startHash && ~startHash_r),

        .ikey_hash_i(ikey_hash), 
        .okey_hash_i(okey_hash),

csr_facts.text: enum logic [2:0] {Idle, WriteSecond, ReadSecond, WriteResp, ReadResp} state_d, state_q;
assign key_big0    = debug_mode_i ? 192'b0 : {key0[0], key0[1], key0[2], key0[3], key0[4], key0[5]};
assign key_big1    = debug_mode_i ? 192'b0 : {key1[0], key1[1], key1[2], key1[3], key1[4], key1[5]};
assign key_big2    = {key2[0], key2[1], key2[2], key2[3], key2[4], key2[5]};
assign key_big = key_sel[1] ? key_big2 : ( key_sel[0] ? key_big1 : key_big0 );
key_reg0[5], key_reg0[4], key_reg0[3], key_reg0[2], key_reg0[1], key_reg0[0]};
key_reg1[5], key_reg1[4], key_reg1[3], key_reg1[2], key_reg1[1], key_reg1[0]};
key_reg2[5], key_reg2[4], key_reg2[3], key_reg2[2], key_reg2[1], key_reg2[0]};
assign core_key  = key_sel[1] ? core_key2 : (key_sel[0] ? core_key1 : core_key0) ;
assign core_keylen  = key_sel[1] ? keylen_reg2 : (key_sel[0] ? keylen_reg1 : keylen_reg0) ;
ADDR_CTRL:    rdata = reglk_ctrl_i[0] ? 32'b0 : {28'h0, core_keylen, encdec_reg, next_reg, init_reg};
assign cii_K0    = debug_mode_i ? 128'b0 : {key0[0], key0[1], key0[2], key0[3]};
assign cii_K1    = debug_mode_i ? 128'b0 : {key1[0], key1[1], key1[2], key1[3]};
assign cii_K2    = debug_mode_i ? 128'b0 : {key2[0], key2[1], key2[2], key2[3]};
assign cii_K = key_sel[1] ? cii_K2 : ( key_sel[0] ? cii_K1 : cii_K0 );
assign key    = debug_mode_i ? 256'b0 : {key0[0], key0[1], key0[2], key0[3], key0[4], key0[5], key0[6], key0[7]};
assign ikey_hash = {ikey_hash_bytes[0], ikey_hash_bytes[1], ikey_hash_bytes[2], ikey_hash_bytes[3], ikey_hash_bytes[4], ikey_hash_bytes[5], ikey_hash_bytes[6], ikey_hash_bytes[7]};

assign okey_hash = debug_mode_i ? 256'b0 : {okey_hash_bytes[0], okey_hash_bytes[1], okey_hash_bytes[2], okey_hash_bytes[3], okey_hash_bytes[4], okey_hash_bytes[5], okey_hash_bytes[6], okey_hash_bytes[7]};
assign reglk_ctrl_o = {reglk_mem[5], reglk_mem[4], reglk_mem[3], reglk_mem[2], reglk_mem[1], reglk_mem[0]};
